title: CTOV - Bountiful compat
description: Compatibility datapack for Bountiful mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Bountiful. You will find bounty board at every village square.

## No longer needed in CTOV version 3.2.1

**Bountiful mod**

Bountiful mod for forge can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
